programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Henry and Bonnie, who are celebrating Lunar New Year. They join them inside the art gallery to find out about Chinese traditions.

programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Smoochy Kiss
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: The Wedding Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: The Getting On Badge
programme.desc: When the squirrels upset the mole by being noisy, Duggee suggests some team building.

programme.title: I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Fatberg, London Sewers, England
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots create some enormous blockages after flushing wet wipes.

programme.title: Cereal Mountain

programme.desc: The Supermarket is frozen over and Supertato, Carrot, Broccoli and Tomato practice for the boat race by using chopsticks for oars, but it doesn't go well as they're out of sync with each other.

programme.title: What We Know with Max Foster
programme.desc: Max Foster has a definitive roundup of the day's top stories, giving you the urgent need-to-know context, plus a deeper dive into the questions sparking debate around the world.

programme.title: The Brief with Jim Sciutto
programme.desc: The best of CNN's reporting from correspondents across the world, to guide global audiences through the fast-paced news cycle with insight, analysis and hard-hitting interviews.

programme.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
programme.desc: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

programme.title: Laura Coates Live
programme.desc: Laura Coates goes inside the story with a relentless pursuit of the facts.

programme.title: The Story Is With Elex Michaelson
programme.desc: Elex Michaelson tackles the breaking stories making headlines with sharp analysis, fresh perspective, and a dose of humor.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom (CNNI) (60m)
programme.desc: Live context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: Amanpour
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour provides her powerful interview skills and provocative analysis on global stories that matter to you.

programme.title: Early Start with Rahel Solomon
programme.desc: The news you need, first thing. Rahel Solomon has you covered with the latest headlines.

programme.title: CNN This Morning
programme.desc: Start your day with Audie Cornish bringing you the latest headlines and analysis.

programme.title: CNN News Central
programme.desc: Stay up to date with John Berman, Kate Bolduan and Sara Sidner from CNN's immersive news hub.

programme.title: World Sport (15m)
programme.desc: Daily sports show features major stories and issues making news in the world of sports.

programme.title: Restored With The Garage Doors
programme.desc: Carmine and Mike's skills are tested when big-ticket items take away from the budget for renovating a Spanish-style home in Leimert Park.

programme.title: From The Outside In
programme.desc: Mike and Carmine take a little inspiration from nature and convert a family's home into a California Craftsman with an organic edge.

programme.title: Familyness
programme.desc: Jenn updates a couple's '80s rancher with a new kitchen, living room and bathroom using a rustic and industrial design.

programme.title: A Frantic Fiasco
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a mid-century property in Placentia, Calif., that is dated, but has a desirable size and layout.

programme.title: Poolside Luxury
programme.desc: Two months into their renovation, Grant and Lynsey renovate the pool area at Chiawa Camp. But heavy rains wash out the roads into camp and cause delays.

programme.title: Reality vs. Reality TV
programme.desc: An exec at HGTV and his wife look to purchase their first home in New Jersey.

programme.title: Business Or Pleasure, Florida
programme.desc: A busy couple is looking for a vacation home. She's thinking about a property for the family, while he's all about making it produce income.

programme.title: Potential In Huntington Beach
programme.desc: A couple who loves hosting searches for the ultimate waterfront party hub in Huntington Beach, California. Their wish list is big and ambitious.

programme.title: A Frantic Fiasco
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a mid-century property in Placentia, Calif., that is dated, but has a desirable size and layout.

programme.title: The Leap To London
programme.desc: A couple searches for English charm after a job opportunity encourages them to move to London.

programme.title: A Climbers Gambit
programme.desc: An engaged couple debates between a fixer upper and a move-in ready home during their house search in Oahu, Hawaii.

programme.title: The Final Flip Off
programme.desc: It's time for the final tally as both teams finish their exteriors. As the offers pour in, the team with the highest return will be crowned winner!

programme.title: Old World Feel
programme.desc: Grant and Lynsey have reached the halfway point of their renovation and decide to tackle Old Mondoro's Sitenje, the camp's public lounge area.

programme.title: Moody Small Space Makeover
programme.desc: Joanna works within a small budget and even smaller rooms to create a moody yet charming palette for practical spaces like a mudroom and art studio.

programme.title: Well That Didn't Go As Planned
programme.desc: Unanticipated failures, schemes going sideways, and good intentions gone wrong. Life is most entertaining when nothing goes according to plan.

programme.title: Maximum Cringe
programme.desc: Life is full of awkward, cringe-worthy fails that we would prefer to forget, but you can't bury the memory when the camera catches it all.

programme.title: Bittersweet Sale
programme.desc: After learning that a member of their team needs to sell her house in a hurry, Lyndsay and Leslie jump into action, promising to forgo any profit.

programme.title: Potential In Huntington Beach
programme.desc: A couple who loves hosting searches for the ultimate waterfront party hub in Huntington Beach, California. Their wish list is big and ambitious.

programme.title: A Frantic Fiasco
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a mid-century property in Placentia, Calif., that is dated, but has a desirable size and layout.

programme.title: Giving Back In Beijing
programme.desc: A New Orleans man moves to Beijing in hopes of continuing the philanthropic work that earned him accolades in his hometown.

programme.title: Hgtv Dream Home 2022
programme.desc: Newlyweds are on the hunt for their first home in Louisville, KY.

programme.title: Reality vs. Reality TV
programme.desc: An exec at HGTV and his wife look to purchase their first home in New Jersey.

programme.title: Business Or Pleasure, Florida
programme.desc: A busy couple is looking for a vacation home. She's thinking about a property for the family, while he's all about making it produce income.

programme.title: Moody Small Space Makeover
programme.desc: Joanna works within a small budget and even smaller rooms to create a moody yet charming palette for practical spaces like a mudroom and art studio.

programme.title: Well That Didn't Go As Planned
programme.desc: Unanticipated failures, schemes going sideways, and good intentions gone wrong. Life is most entertaining when nothing goes according to plan.

programme.title: Maximum Cringe
programme.desc: Life is full of awkward, cringe-worthy fails that we would prefer to forget, but you can't bury the memory when the camera catches it all.

programme.title: The Final Flip Off
programme.desc: It's time for the final tally as both teams finish their exteriors. As the offers pour in, the team with the highest return will be crowned winner!

programme.title: The Hamptons And Gatsby
programme.desc: Keith and Evan take a risk with quirky ideas for two decrepit houses. They design a beachy, Hamptons-inspired cottage and a moody art deco bungalow.

programme.title: Quirky In Orange County
programme.desc: A social media influencer is looking for a quirky place to call home in Orange County, California. Her at-home business needs are a priority.

programme.title: Loud, Louder, Loudest
programme.desc: Christina receives an e-mail from an agent who has a listing in the South Bay neighbourhood of Hawthorne.

programme.title: New Block New Drama
programme.desc: Four teams of design superstars create gorgeous kitchens and living rooms as the ultimate home renovation competition kicks off.

programme.title: You Talkin' To Me?
programme.desc: The doorbell camera becomes an interactive tool for comedic communication when friends, neighbours, and strangers talk to the camera.

programme.title: The Perils Of Parenting
programme.desc: In the past, children's behaviour and parental failures were private, but when your house records everything, moments of disbelief get put on display.

programme.title: Trading Fast For Family Life
programme.desc: With their first child on the way, a couple needs to trade their tiny apartment for a long-term home in Vero Beach, Florida.

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: Weird Discoveries
programme.desc: History is riddled with brilliant discoveries-from gold to lost treasures to scientific findings. But some discoveries are anything but ordinary. Like finding evidence of a tiny otherworldly creature.

programme.title: Mysterious Monsters
programme.desc: Throughout the world, there have been many sightings of bizarre creatures that cannot be explained by science. Is it possible that there are terrifying monsters, lurking in the shadows of planet Earth?

programme.title: Chum Goes To Hollywood
programme.desc: Rick aims to negotiate a football helmet signed by 28 Heisman winners. Chum travels to LA to iron out a deal for vintage garb. Will he be able to thread the needle, or will his trip be oh sew pointless?

programme.title: Pad Thai
programme.desc: The Food That Built Asia travels to Thailand to discover and learn from the locals about the unique tastes that distinguish pad Thai from other famous dishes around the world.

programme.title: Chilli Crab
programme.desc: Discover the spicy legacy of Singapore's national treasure, Chilli Crab, a dish invented by a housewife, has managed to culturally feed a nation and drawn crowds from every corner of the globe.

programme.title: Big Apple Rick
programme.desc: Rick's in the big apple to see if he can compute a deal on a rare piece of tech. Will this enticing piece lure Rick in? A seller brings a special edition Stan Lee Funko Pop. Will Corey make a super deal?

programme.title: Creating A New World
programme.desc: Against all odds, Disney turns 27,000 acres of muddy Florida swampland into the world's largest and most visited theme park.

programme.title: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Lighting up the backyard grill is an American summer tradition. But 100 years ago, cooking outside was rare. It took Henry Ford, tinkerer Kingsford, and an ardent butcher to transform American backyards.

programme.title: The Sobibor Revolt
programme.desc: During World War II, the Nazis created specialised Death Camps for killing prisoners. At Sobibor, a group of Jews were forced to keep the camp operational, engineered a daring escape that saved many lives.

programme.title: Shady Secrets
programme.desc: Some secrets refuse to stay buried. Whether it's illicit cargo in a frozen lake, a stolen masterpiece worth millions, or a brothel hidden in the shadow of the Capitol-the truth always resurfaces.

programme.title: Lost Nazi Artifacts
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos' search for treasure-filled, lost Nazi U-Boats takes an unexpected turn when a 98-year-old local eyewitness gives him a tip that changes the course of his investigation.

programme.title: Unlocking The Secrets Of Stonehenge
programme.desc: It's one of the most famous prehistoric monuments on Earth. A mysterious arrangement of stones that have adorned the English countryside for millennia. But nobody knows how the landmark was built or why.

programme.title: Living In A Metamaterial World
programme.desc: After conducting an experiment that reveals more evidence of incredible phenomena in the skies above Skinwalker Ranch, the team learns that the mystery of the property may be located deep underground.

programme.title: Egypt's Giant Tombs
programme.desc: Deep beneath the sands of Egypt lie 24 enormous sarcophagi-and every one of them is empty. What purpose might these giant tombs have served? And is it possible that they were designed by alien visitors?

programme.title: Mad Woman Woods
programme.desc: Troy and Pickle help a friend look for his lost dog. Bill and Tes search for pythons in a spot ravaged by wildfires. Zak and Bruce investigate an abandoned boat yard.

programme.title: Biomechanics of Punches and Kicks
programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about how the use of motion animation technology can help martial artists learn more efficient ways to put extra power behind their punches and kicks.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Dmitry Priog vs. Daniel Jacobs
programme.desc: This episode features a middleweight battle between Dmitry Priog and Daniel Jacobs that ends in a crushing overhand right, as well as kickboxing, sumo, weapons and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing Ricardo Mayorga in a light middleweight title fight, the first of two bouts between the two, that features an exciting last-minute finish. Also on the card, action from former champs Juan Manuel Marquez and Juan Diaz.

programme.title: Fukuoka, Japan: Show 3
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Kotoyuki, Asanoyama, Aoiyama and Ryuden from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Rusty Derouen
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector 'Macho' Camacho (46-3-0, 20 KO) battles Rusty Derouen (33-6-0, 25 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from Erie, Pennsylvania, USA.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Andrew Van Zyl vs. Champion Dalcha
programme.desc: This episode features main event Andrew 'One Gear' Van Zyl vs. Champion Dalcha for the heavyweight title. From EFC71 in Carnival City, Johannesburg, South Africa on 23-June-2018.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Andre Ward vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features light heavyweights Andre 'S.O.G.' Ward (25-0, 13 KOs) vs. Chad Dawson (31-1, 17 KOs) in a championship contest from the Oracle Arena in Oakland, California, USA, on September 8, 2012. A paid attendance of 7,611 brought in a gate of $706,469 and 1.

programme.title: Men's CMX Form and Weapons
programme.desc: Featuring Men's CMX Forms and Weapons, and a World Record Break by Chip Townsend at the ISKA US Open from Disney, Orlando, Florida, USA.

programme.title: World Team Championships
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best judo of the World Team Championships from Budapest, where we will see history made as it's the first time a new mixed gender team format will be seen.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Danny Garcia vs. Erik Morales
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Danny Garcia looking to win the WBC super lightweight championship when he squares off with Erik Morales, but Garcia must battle back after suffering a nose injury early on. Also on the card, former world champions Hector Camacho and Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: Fukuoka, Japan: Show 4
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 featuring Daieisho, Onosho, Abi and Takayasu from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Todd Foster
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector "Macho" Camacho (47-3-0 21 KO) faces Todd Foster (33-3-0 29 KO) in a 12-round contest for the vacant IBC Welterweight Title from Atlantic City New Jersey USA.

programme.desc: 《凤凰全球连线》为你带来世界各地的热点新闻，并深入探讨事件始末因由，分析事情的重要性。主持人会于直播时段，通过卫星、电话与全球各地的凤凰卫视记者、特约记者、评论员连线，向你汇报当天要闻。

programme.title: 亚洲财经透视
programme.desc: 立足香港国际金融中心，跟踪每日资本市场动态，聚焦热门政经事件，汇总境内外媒体多元财经观点，第一时间邀请政府官员、顶尖学者、投行分析师等权威嘉宾全方位解读重大财经政策，为观众创造多面向丰富视角。

programme.title: 新闻今日谈 (14/4/26)
programme.desc: 此节目针对每天最热门的时事话题，在观众最关注的时刻即时作出评论，让观众更洞悉事件的真相。

programme.title: A Roommate To Die For
programme.desc: After a nasty breakup, Faith needs a new roommate to pay for the home. The new renter seems great until Faith finds that something very strange is going on.

programme.title: The Neighbors Are Watching
programme.desc: When a handsome neighbor moves in, a single woman trying to escape her past in the new subdivision believes she has witnessed her new neighbor committing murder. Unfortunately, nobody believes her.

programme.title: Soul Eggs in Purgatory
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines the flavours of Morocco, Tunisia and Louisiana by making savoury cheddar cheese grits topped with "eggs in purgatory", a dish made with spicy tomato sauce, similar to shakshuka.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot: Deviled Popcorn Chicken With Fiery Cheese Popcorn And Ranch Dipper
programme.desc: In this episode Rachael's in party mode and she's firing up popcorn with popcorn chicken and if you like those both super spicy, you're in the right place at the right time.
Our cooks are set the challenge of making a dish from Mystery Box ingredients chosen by Jamie Oliver's parents, with the four weakest dishes set to send their makers into tomorrow's elimination.

programme.title: Camilla and David
programme.desc: David made a promise to Camilla's mom that he would bring her home to the East Coast when they retired. Now they are back, looking for their forever home, close to family and with a great ocean view.

programme.title: That's a Restaurant
programme.desc: Tune is as host Michael Yo takes us to places set to satisfy the palate, while also challenging our ideas of a dining experience. Our first stop is a sushi-bar and game-show joint in New York City.
Today, we'll explore a house where, if the perfect wooden furniture isn't available, the couple takes matters into their own hands, creating their own pieces, making it feel like a cozy cafe.

programme.title: The Neighbors Are Watching
programme.desc: When a handsome neighbor moves in, a single woman trying to escape her past in the new subdivision believes she has witnessed her new neighbor committing murder. Unfortunately, nobody believes her.

programme.title: Abducted At An HBCU: A Black Girl Missing Movie
programme.desc: When ambitious college student Shannon disappears due to financial struggles, her counselor Ellen discovers a trafficking ring targeting students like her and must fight to rescue Shannon.

programme.title: My Unlovely Lady Lumps
programme.desc: Tobi is having trouble re-entering the dating pool because of symmetrical, bottom-shaped bumps around her spine. Tia is a beautiful young woman whose huge scalp growth has sent her into self-imposed exile.

Five celebrity friends go on a trip together but at each stop where it costs money, they will have to play games against each other to be exempt from paying. One final loser will cover the costs for all.
Instead of sticking to a single concept, these homes are decorated according to the owner's personal tastes. We'll showcase homes where you can see the ultimate expression of personal style.
Five contestants will get a personal Jamie Oliver masterclass as they try to 'Keep Up with Jamie'. There's no recipe, only the ability to watch Jamie like a hawk to recreate an Oliver family recipe.

programme.title: Geralyn and Art
programme.desc: After recovering from cancer, Geralyn's doctor encouraged her to embrace life with husband Art. Their journey leads to the ocean, where they are on a hunt to find a home that truly speaks to them.

programme.title: Fried Chicken Monte Cristo
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Chicken Fricassee
programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a Southern spin on the classic French-inspired chicken fricassee. She starts by seasoning and browning the chicken, then simmers it in a sauce made with vegetables, cream and white wine.

programme.title: Beyond the Readings: Feeding The Soul
programme.desc: Downtime is very rare in the life of Theresa Caputo. In this episode, Theresa nurtures her soul by cherishing moments with family and prioritizing self-care, all while graciously channeling spirit.

programme.title: Fastest Arroz Con Pollo
programme.desc: Arroz con pollo, or chicken and rice, is a traditional Latin American dish loved by millions worldwide. Rachael shows you how to make it quickly and easily so that it becomes a household staple.

Five celebrity friends go on a trip together but at each stop where it costs money, they will have to play games against each other to be exempt from paying. One final loser will cover the costs for all.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: Famous mystery writer Victoria Rollins is presumed dead until her social-media page announces her new novel. But when a fan tries to confirm the author's existence, she's flung into a deadly web of lies.

programme.title: Beyond the Readings: Feeding The Soul
programme.desc: Downtime is very rare in the life of Theresa Caputo. In this episode, Theresa nurtures her soul by cherishing moments with family and prioritizing self-care, all while graciously channeling spirit.

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: Lion's Share
programme.desc: The SWAT team races to stop a violent rampage with ties to a painful chapter from Hicks' past.

programme.title: Round And Round
programme.desc: A deceased John Doe forces Jenny and Clark to work together in the world of narcotics and therapy.

programme.title: Northern Rexposure
programme.desc: When Jesse's sister contacts him for help, he, Sarah and Rex head to Northern Ontario and find themselves in the middle of a deadly situation.

programme.title: The Vow
programme.desc: When a toddler is found at the scene of a crime, John and Bailey must decide whether to let the child go to a shelter for the night or care for her themselves. Meanwhile, Tim dissapears when someone from his past returns and leaves Lucy in the dark.

programme.title: Atonement
programme.desc: Mickey makes a big mistake in her hunt for the killer, but her family helps to right the problem. A major showdown unites the neighborhood but turns deadly.

programme.title: Unearth
programme.desc: Two jurors for a mafia trial are gunned down, the team jumps into an organized crime investigation.

programme.title: Blue Flock

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA JUMBO MAS BAKSO
programme.desc: Hendra is a wealthy heir who defies his father by choosing to sell meatballs (bakso) instead of running the family empire. While preparing for a major festival, he is hit by a motorcycle carrying Ratna (Michelle Ziudith), a curvy girl with a huge appetite for meatballs. To Hendra’s fury, Ratna’s boyfriend whisks her away without apologizing. However, fate brings them together again when they cross paths at the very festival Hendra is competing in.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: How To Make King of Strawberry Sebelum Hari H
programme.desc: Refusing to marry the man her father chose, Sila (Shanice Margaretha) runs away and crosses paths with Rafan (Hardi Fadhillah). It’s love at first sight for her, but her father isn't giving up so easily. He has already prepared a scheme that is guaranteed to get under Rafan's skin and test their budding romance.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Sampahnya Dipungut Perasaanku Keangkut
programme.desc: Hana (Shanice Margaretha) works hard as a garbage collector, driving a three-wheeled motor cart every day. Her life changes when she bravely saves a young girl named Chika (Firzanah Alya) from a kidnapping attempt. Grateful for her bravery, Chika’s wealthy father, Adit (Fendy Chow), immediately hires Hana to be his daughter's full-time nanny.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Chicken Wings Senyumnya Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Marah
programme.desc: Desperate to escape an arranged marriage with Kelvin, Dinda (Jennifer Eve) runs away from home. While being chased by her father’s men, she spots an open car and hides inside. Little does she know, the car belongs to Baim (El Ryan Carlen), who happens to be Kelvin's best friend. Now, Dinda must navigate her feelings while staying hidden from those searching for her.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Kita Yang Kampung Tapi Semesta Mendukung
programme.desc: Jali (Kenny Austin) is a handsome young man with a secret: he hasn't been circumcised. Worried about his son’s future, his father, Babe Hai, comes up with a desperate plan to tie Jali to his bed and calls for a doctor. Enter Nadia (Jennifer Eve), a beautiful young doctor new to the village health clinic. Her presence causes a sensation, and she quickly goes viral, leading to a crowd of local men suddenly faking illnesses just to get a check-up from her.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA GUE ANTI UTANG
programme.desc: Tommy (Hardi Fadhillah) hates his job: collecting debts for his father. His latest assignment is Bu Anisa, who hasn't paid her twenty-five million rupiah debt in five years. Tommy is ready to be firm until he meets Ratih (Naomi Zaskia), Bu Anisa's daughter. Ratih touches Tommy’s heart when she promises to pay off the debt using her meager salary as a village school teacher.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Manusia Silver Gantengnya Bikin Baper
programme.desc: Dewa (Lavicky Nicholas) moves to the big city with one goal: to get rich and marry his girlfriend back home. But his urban adventure takes a weird turn when he meets Dewi (Larasati Nugroho), a woman who makes a living through a very peculiar and unexpected profession.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.desc: Tommy (Hardi Fadhillah) hates his job: collecting debts for his father. His latest assignment is Bu Anisa, who hasn't paid her twenty-five million rupiah debt in five years. Tommy is ready to be firm until he meets Ratih (Naomi Zaskia), Bu Anisa's daughter. Ratih touches Tommy’s heart when she promises to pay off the debt using her meager salary as a village school teacher.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Manusia Silver Gantengnya Bikin Baper
programme.desc: Dewa (Lavicky Nicholas) moves to the big city with one goal: to get rich and marry his girlfriend back home. But his urban adventure takes a weird turn when he meets Dewi (Larasati Nugroho), a woman who makes a living through a very peculiar and unexpected profession.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA JUMBO MAS BAKSO
programme.desc: Hendra is a wealthy heir who defies his father by choosing to sell meatballs (bakso) instead of running the family empire. While preparing for a major festival, he is hit by a motorcycle carrying Ratna (Michelle Ziudith), a curvy girl with a huge appetite for meatballs. To Hendra’s fury, Ratna’s boyfriend whisks her away without apologizing. However, fate brings them together again when they cross paths at the very festival Hendra is competing in.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: How To Make King of Strawberry Sebelum Hari H
programme.desc: Refusing to marry the man her father chose, Sila (Shanice Margaretha) runs away and crosses paths with Rafan (Hardi Fadhillah). It’s love at first sight for her, but her father isn't giving up so easily. He has already prepared a scheme that is guaranteed to get under Rafan's skin and test their budding romance.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Sampahnya Dipungut Perasaanku Keangkut
programme.desc: Hana (Shanice Margaretha) works hard as a garbage collector, driving a three-wheeled motor cart every day. Her life changes when she bravely saves a young girl named Chika (Firzanah Alya) from a kidnapping attempt. Grateful for her bravery, Chika’s wealthy father, Adit (Fendy Chow), immediately hires Hana to be his daughter's full-time nanny.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SI MANIS PENJAGA HATI YANG TAK INGKAR JANJI
programme.desc: After losing her security job and having her motorcycle taken by Leo (Junior Liem), Aya (Yunita Siregar) chases him down, thinking he’s a thief. Leo is a spoiled rich man who hates being followed by guards. When his frustrated bodyguards quit, Leo's father, Mr. Herman, desperately looks for a replacement. Despite his initial doubts, Mr. Herman hires Aya after seeing her impressive pencak silat skills making her the new protector for the man she tried to punch.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mau Bikin Romantis Ternyata Bikin Nangis
programme.desc: Deva (Ika Diharjo) balances two lives: she’s a pencak silat instructor and a cleaning service worker at Rizki’s (Mahdy Reza) college. Rizki, who is nursing a broken heart after being cheated on, desperately needs a distraction. He asks Deva to pose as his new girlfriend to impress his mother, leading to a fake relationship filled with kicks and complications.

programme.desc: Kanmani, a talented chef, falls for Anbu, heir to Raj Foods, while her actress friend Vennila also catches his eye. After an unexpected marriage, will Anbu accept Kanmani as his wife?

programme.title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
programme.desc: Ilamathi is stuck between a brave cop and a bad goon. This love triangle is dangerous. Can her heart handle the trouble? She must choose between the two men.

programme.desc: The tiny futuristic city of Shmandor exacts revenge on Patrick Star. // Patrick and Squidina go on location to interview their neighbors.

programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob experience the wonders of the workforce.

programme.title: Dance, Dance Resolution / A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: It's the Sadie Hawkins dance at school and Lincoln's sisters have accidentally landed him four dates! // When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: One of the Boys / A Tattler's Tale
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality. // Lola wants to be a part of the siblings' secrets club, but they won't let her in because she's a 'tattle tale'.

programme.desc: Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids are good, so she uses baby smarts to avert sibling disasters.

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 暴徒打砸谢庭威中枪 救驾有功的谢庭威获得了巴朗的信任，何浩辉跟邵峰分析现在叫谢庭威归队有点可惜，会看紧庭威。何浩辉代替谢庭威到学校演讲，何乐轩十分骄傲。 关颖在棠哥家仍然和混混联系，凭借红姐对自己的喜爱管红姐要钱花。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 在混沌初开的世界中，真师虽神通广大却踪迹难寻。人羽两族长期争夺大陆统治权，战火不断。直到一名少年将军统合五族，建立大晁王朝。然而，夜北地区尚未被纳入大晁版图，各部族间争斗不息。夜北大渊古之女叶凌霜与朱颜公主七海蕊偷偷出游后回到部族，却受到不同的待遇。在秋选之日，突然出现的雪狼王引发混乱，大晁君主彧修明救下叶凌霜并欣赏她的勇气。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵开始用更激进手段追回银行借出的欠款，十七以为她回复奸商本性，却从大红姐口中得知真相，对桂婵彻底改观。宁俐纹身的真相被拆穿，无颜面对韦豪等人，离去后却不知所踪，韦豪前往寻找只见宁俐伤卧床上，更被指控是伤害宁俐的凶徒。桂新继续联合六爷、八爷向桂婵施压撤资，斧头帮带人来银行捣乱。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明识破叶凌霜下毒计策，叶凌霜无法救七海蕊，只能与她一起离开夜北。七海蕊被选为和亲对象，叶凌霜决定陪她同去大晁。途中翼无忧出现试图救走七海蕊，但被界诸婴阻止。同时，大晁内部发生军令冲突，界海天私自调兵导致蓝衣军大败。叶凌霜得知彧修明真实身份后感到震惊。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 巴朗抓内鬼庭威传信 谢庭威打出电话，是雄记茶餐厅，证明了庭威的清白，何浩辉决定第二天无论如何都要收网。手机被没收的谢庭威为了尽快将消息传递出去，主动要求试试希罗达，在仪式后发起了高烧。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 好搭档
programme.desc: 讲述人气离婚律师车恩京（张娜拉饰）陷入离婚危机，她与新人律师韩宥利（南志铉饰）经常因案件产生激烈冲突，一场律师间职场斗争即将上演。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵中枪入院，四海前来挑衅，十七气得要抢警务处处长的手枪射杀四海。桂新回到永业银行夺权，十七谎称桂婵已升他为总经理，代理其职务，获一众职员支持。桂婵发现公司没有自己依旧运作如常，内心失落。十七得悉后，率一班职员故意表现得没桂婵不行，哄桂婵开心；十七还骂醒桂新，要让他与桂婵兄妹重归于好。

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 警匪激战周雄再逃脱 民生货柜场内，伊亚和八皮开始交易。何浩辉突然叫停行动，只让密切跟踪这两拨人。原来谢庭威通过设计好的暗号，将交易有诈的信息传递给何浩辉。周雄告诉八皮，演出开始了。伊亚将车开进合力货柜场，一众警员跟踪车辆驶往合力货柜场。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 夜北与大晁发生战争，大晁君主彧修明斩杀七海震宇，夜北战败。叶凌霜被俘，后利用智谋得到谢雨安的帮助逃到钦天监，被界海天收为徒弟。同时，她身上的琥珀石里困着星算大师云纹，二人达成合作。另一方面，彧修明决定迁移夜北人到越州，引起界海天和界诸婴的不满和困扰。

programme.title: The Lord Of The Rings: The War Of The Rohirrim
programme.desc: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim tells the fate of the House of Helm Hammerhand, the legendary King of Rohan.

programme.title: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: An uncontrollable demonic wraith mixes the quick and dead with a laugh and a fright in this comic fantasy.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: After being abandoned at the altar by his sweetheart, wedding singer Adam Sandler is jaded by love until he meets a waitress played by Drew Barrymore.

programme.title: Grudge Match
programme.desc: Thirty years after their last title fight, two retired boxers and lifelong rivals decide to step into the ring once more to settle an old score.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: Scooby and the gang face their biggest, most challenging mystery ever, a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Piece By Piece
programme.desc: Follow this autobiography where Pharrell Williams shows his imaginative and creative process using Lego, as he constructs Lego models representing his artistic development. Each build reflects a different creative milestone.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Three divorced women seek revenge on the husbands who left them for younger women.

programme.title: Young Adult
programme.desc: When things are no longer what they used to be, a former prom queen and her friend realise that it is time for them to grow up.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: A young man discovers the meaning of true love while battling princes, ghosts and an evil witch in a quest to protect the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: Scooby and the gang face their biggest, most challenging mystery ever, a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: After being abandoned at the altar by his sweetheart, wedding singer Adam Sandler is jaded by love until he meets a waitress played by Drew Barrymore.

programme.title: Grudge Match
programme.desc: Thirty years after their last title fight, two retired boxers and lifelong rivals decide to step into the ring once more to settle an old score.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A veteran assigned to extract Earth's remaining resources begins to question his mission and his being.

programme.title: 生死门
programme.desc: 铁匠仇子玉，擅打利刀，且为武林高手，本已退隐江湖，但正气未泯，应武林大豪屠一堃之邀，联手对抗四大巨盗，夺回价值连城的飞龙璧物归原主。谁知屠只是利用「鹬蚌相争，渔人得利」的局面夺取该璧据为己有，事成后仇亦惨遭毒手。飞刀手云翔知悉屠之卑鄙手段后，登时大发志士之愤，勇闯屠布下之旗阵夺取飞龙璧，交回侦缉队长...

programme.title: 怒海情仇
programme.desc: 故事描述，青年渔夫鲁金虎与渔女小玉自幼相好；土豪独子耀祖，垂涎小玉美色，时藉故亲近；一天耀祖欺负寡妇五嫂，金虎抱不平，几动武，惹小玉误会金虎与五嫂有不寻常关系...

programme.title: 新陈三五娘
programme.desc: 泉州才子陈伯卿，邂逅潮州第一美人黄碧琚，心生倾慕；后伯卿得知两人幼时曾定亲，于是隐瞒身份，卖身黄府，作陪读书僮，以接近碧琚。陕西巡抚之子林大雄，垂涎碧琚美色，强自下聘，欲娶之为妻；碧琚父贪财怕势，不理家人反对，收下林家聘礼。伯卿得知碧琚已有婚配，刺激过度，一病不起...

programme.title: 无法无天飞车党
programme.desc: 文员郭静中，偕妻子陈美娟、妹嘉莉，乘搭渡轮往离岛渡假。同船而往者，有喜以飞车寻求刺激的「飞车党」；此次前往离岛，所有飞仔都各自带备一部电单车。「飞车党」之首叫尊尼，是个冷酷青年。其弟米高爱闯祸捣乱，亦是「飞车党」之一员。米高在船上见到性感的嘉莉，竟出手调戏......

programme.title: 双镯
programme.desc: 两名少女作盟誓要在一个没有女权，甚或缺乏性自由的小渔村互相照顾一生。一位最终下嫁自己不认识的人，之后过着幸福快乐的日子。而另一位少女则惨遭许配给虐待成性的富家子，于是她唯有设法摆脱这个困境。

programme.title: 大杀手
programme.desc: 结义兄弟妹三人同闯江湖情意深，龙兄加入了缉私队，虎弟率直被人利用，小妹夹在中间做人难。

programme.title: 军阀趣史
programme.desc: 此片可谓李翰祥导演，经典作《大军阀》之延续，焦点在几位当时得令的艳星，余莎莉、邵音音及楚湘云。片中「艳趣」特别多...

programme.title: 铁手无情
programme.desc: 沧州捕头铁无情嫉恶如仇，先后击杀沧州剧盗。铁被盗首马威甲的夺魂笔所伤，混乱间，以马的坐骑突围而出，竟被送往马家，认识马双目失明的女儿桂姑。最后，铁与马于山上决战，马终伏法，铁返回桂姑身边。

programme.title: 女儿国
programme.desc: 本片讲述唐僧、孙悟空、猪八戒及沙和尚一行四人往西天取经，行至西梁女儿国，国内全是女人，而传宗接代生儿育女全靠「招胎泉」，饮过这泉水便可成孕，但也只能生女。

programme.title: 南少林与北少林
programme.desc: 满清入主中原后，北少林为免遭剿灭，只好受命派出弟子到清军府担任教头，谁知抵达后，始知府中已有南少林教头；期间将军挑动两派人不和继而公开比武互相残杀，后南派因弟子伤亡而与北派交恶，展开一番互相残杀...

programme.title: 愤怒青年
programme.desc: 沈昌生性沉郁，与父亲缺乏沟通，被人利用，误入歧途。昌逃不过暴力的魔爪和色情的引诱，竟然出卖父亲，让父亲惨死。昌悲悔交加，独闯飞仔巢，逐一将之击毙，自已也进入疯狂状态。

programme.title: 蔡李佛小子
programme.desc: 年青马车夫钟坚因救助少女而与恶霸结怨。马车老板恐惹祸上身，把他辞退。钟坚决志除暴安良，随少林蔡李佛名家习武，向恶势力挑战。最后，他将恶霸除掉，令地方归于平静。

programme.title: 乾隆皇奇遇记
programme.desc: 乾隆皇帝微服出巡，希望藉此了解百姓的生活需要，但却碰上连串的奇遇，乾隆更被衙差关进牢狱，差点要被斩首...最后又有谁可拯救皇帝出困境？

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 暴徒打砸谢庭威中枪 救驾有功的谢庭威获得了巴朗的信任，何浩辉跟邵峰分析现在叫谢庭威归队有点可惜，会看紧庭威。何浩辉代替谢庭威到学校演讲，何乐轩十分骄傲。 关颖在棠哥家仍然和混混联系，凭借红姐对自己的喜爱管红姐要钱花。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 在混沌初开的世界中，真师虽神通广大却踪迹难寻。人羽两族长期争夺大陆统治权，战火不断。直到一名少年将军统合五族，建立大晁王朝。然而，夜北地区尚未被纳入大晁版图，各部族间争斗不息。夜北大渊古之女叶凌霜与朱颜公主七海蕊偷偷出游后回到部族，却受到不同的待遇。在秋选之日，突然出现的雪狼王引发混乱，大晁君主彧修明救下叶凌霜并欣赏她的勇气。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵开始用更激进手段追回银行借出的欠款，十七以为她回复奸商本性，却从大红姐口中得知真相，对桂婵彻底改观。宁俐纹身的真相被拆穿，无颜面对韦豪等人，离去后却不知所踪，韦豪前往寻找只见宁俐伤卧床上，更被指控是伤害宁俐的凶徒。桂新继续联合六爷、八爷向桂婵施压撤资，斧头帮带人来银行捣乱。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 巴朗抓内鬼庭威传信 谢庭威打出电话，是雄记茶餐厅，证明了庭威的清白，何浩辉决定第二天无论如何都要收网。手机被没收的谢庭威为了尽快将消息传递出去，主动要求试试希罗达，在仪式后发起了高烧。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明识破叶凌霜下毒计策，叶凌霜无法救七海蕊，只能与她一起离开夜北。七海蕊被选为和亲对象，叶凌霜决定陪她同去大晁。途中翼无忧出现试图救走七海蕊，但被界诸婴阻止。同时，大晁内部发生军令冲突，界海天私自调兵导致蓝衣军大败。叶凌霜得知彧修明真实身份后感到震惊。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 巴朗抓内鬼庭威传信 谢庭威打出电话，是雄记茶餐厅，证明了庭威的清白，何浩辉决定第二天无论如何都要收网。手机被没收的谢庭威为了尽快将消息传递出去，主动要求试试希罗达，在仪式后发起了高烧。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明识破叶凌霜下毒计策，叶凌霜无法救七海蕊，只能与她一起离开夜北。七海蕊被选为和亲对象，叶凌霜决定陪她同去大晁。途中翼无忧出现试图救走七海蕊，但被界诸婴阻止。同时，大晁内部发生军令冲突，界海天私自调兵导致蓝衣军大败。叶凌霜得知彧修明真实身份后感到震惊。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 好搭档
programme.desc: 讲述人气离婚律师车恩京（张娜拉饰）陷入离婚危机，她与新人律师韩宥利（南志铉饰）经常因案件产生激烈冲突，一场律师间职场斗争即将上演。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵中枪入院，四海前来挑衅，十七气得要抢警务处处长的手枪射杀四海。桂新回到永业银行夺权，十七谎称桂婵已升他为总经理，代理其职务，获一众职员支持。桂婵发现公司没有自己依旧运作如常，内心失落。十七得悉后，率一班职员故意表现得没桂婵不行，哄桂婵开心；十七还骂醒桂新，要让他与桂婵兄妹重归于好。

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.title: 守诚者

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递

programme.desc: Discover just how much cream it takes to make premium toffee; what ingredients make delectable vegan-friendly pesto; why five seconds can be the deciding factor in making the perfect cup of coffee; and what the connection is between ice rocket lollipops and Canadian birch trees.

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover why a chocolate bath is essential to make a perfect ice cream cone; how a new generation of sodapop lovers get their fizzy fix; why pasta needs a haircut and a blow dry before it can hit the plate; and how 17 million pieces of bubble gum get made every single day.

programme.title: Salmon
programme.desc: Patrick is in British Columbia to observe the annual salmon run, which plays a crucial role in ensuring the species' survival while also sustaining the entire rainforest ecosystem.

programme.title: Nepal - The Mustang Kingdom
programme.desc: Join Ryan as he treks through the Upper Mustang Kingdom and explores a remote Himalayan Kingdom in central Nepal.

programme.title: Ireland
programme.desc: On Great Blasket Island, off the coast of Ireland, Ben stays with London couple Dan and Emily, who landed an extraordinary job as island caretakers on Europe's rugged western frontier.

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover just how much cream it takes to make premium toffee; what ingredients make delectable vegan-friendly pesto; why five seconds can be the deciding factor in making the perfect cup of coffee; and what the connection is between ice rocket lollipops and Canadian birch trees.

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover why a chocolate bath is essential to make a perfect ice cream cone; how a new generation of sodapop lovers get their fizzy fix; why pasta needs a haircut and a blow dry before it can hit the plate; and how 17 million pieces of bubble gum get made every single day.

programme.title: Salmon
programme.desc: Patrick is in British Columbia to observe the annual salmon run, which plays a crucial role in ensuring the species' survival while also sustaining the entire rainforest ecosystem.

programme.title: Dollhouse Detectives
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Why Ants Work Together
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Ants didn't work together. The Ants desperately wanted to build themselves a home, but all the animals kept sitting on them, or sneezing them far away or swooping them up into tall trees! On the point of giving up, one brave, young soldier ant rallies the troops… "Pamoja! Together! Together they can do anything!!!"… and he was right. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Flea Jumps
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Flea didn't jump. Flea didn't really move at all. She was very big and very round. All Flea wanted to do was to see the world. The Tinga Tinga animals try to help lift Flea high up, but she is too heavy. Then Tortoise comes up with an idea ‘Movement and activity!' and after many attempts Flea discovers that she can jump. She can jump really high! Then Flea can jump everywhere and see everything.! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Bouncing Bulb
programme.desc: Pat's Special Delivery is a very large, very fragile lighthouse bulb, and everything seems to be conspiring to make him break it! Falling timber, an out of control sofa, Bonnie the dog, high winds...! Pat's journey from the sorting office to Pencaster Bay is a minefield of hazards. Waiting for the bulb is lighthouse keeper Chris Beacon and his pet parrot Micawber, both anxious to get the lighthouse working before sundown, and tracking a storm blowing in.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Lost Pigeon
programme.desc: The Thompson's family pigeon, Cedric, has been reported found in Northern Ireland. Pat must take Dorothy and Bill to help bring him back in the SDS Plane. Meanwhile Alf camps out at the sorting office, pining for his beloved Cedric's return. Once in Ireland, Pat meets the man who found Cedric and Dorothy manages to charm him down from his roof. Unfortunately an inopportune phone call from Alf startles cedric and causes him to take up a roost on a cliff face with a friendly puffin.

programme.title: Marsha Wonderful Life
programme.desc: Marsha overhears the others saying she is too bossy. She decides that Silver hatch would be a better place without her. Chaos swiftly ensues, can Marsha be persuaded to stay, they can't cope without her!

programme.title: Let's Hear It For Big Chris
programme.desc: Big Chris is working on Loada while the others plan a surprise evening for him for being the longest serving member of Silver hatch

programme.title: Funny Business
programme.desc: Big Chris receives a mysterious parcel… the cars are intrigued to find out what is in it. Strange and silly things start happening at the workshop, could it have anything to do with Big Chris' package?

programme.title: Nick Solves The Case
programme.desc: PC Pete has been summonsed to get to the bottom of some missing fuel. But where's Nick? And who can solve the case?

programme.title: The Case Of The Disappearing Rainbow
programme.desc: It's Fable Forest Rainbow Day when the big rainbow in Fable Forest sparkles and pops like a giant firework. Everyone is looking forward to it until the colours start fading from the rainbow! Noddy needs to investigate before the rainbow disappears for good! Revs converts into a helicopter so that Noddy and Bumpy can fly over the rainbow to find the pot of rainbow gold. They discover that Cloppycorn has been taking the gold from the pot to give his unicorn horn a special golden glow.

programme.title: The Case Of The Flying Toy
programme.desc: When Noddy sees Deltoid flying in the air he decides to investigate: how can they get Deltoid down? Realising that magic is involved, Noddy goes to see Queen Sparklewings to see if she can help but she tells him her wand has gone missing. Someone must be trying to do magic with her wand! Meanwhile more flying toys appear, first Fuse and then Smartysaurus.

programme.title: The Case Of The Spooky Noise
programme.desc: The Naughticorns have borrowed Noddy's music player to practise a special dance for Pat-Pat's Pumpkin Party. But when Noddy arrives at the party, the other toys are all scared by a strange noise. Noddy decides to investigate: what's making the scary noise? Using his investigating skills and following all the clues, Noddy arrives at the Naughticorn Stables where he realises that the scary noise is actually a slowed down tune on the music player.

programme.title: The Case Of The Upset Animals
programme.desc: Something upsets all the animals at the farm at night and no one can get to sleep . Farmer Tom asks Noddy to investigate before night falls so that everyone can go to sleep properly. Using his wwwbook to gather clues and using all his investigation skills Noddy travels all over Toyland to find out what has been disturbing the animals. He works out that the new stickers that PatPat gave to the the animals are made out of glow in the dark paper.

programme.title: Cakey’s Cupcake Cousins
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby, I Shrunk the Kitties!
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Mecha-Menace
programme.desc: Magnus and Axel unveil their new "mechano-dragon." It's impressive at first, but the Riders set out to prove it's no better than a bucket of bolts.

programme.title: Summer Holiday
programme.desc: In need of some rest and relaxation, the Riders head out on vacation. But their supposedly perfect island getaway isn't quite what they hoped for.

programme.title: Lost and Found / In the Park In the Dark
programme.desc: The Community Center's Lost and Found is full and it's up to the gang to use their detective skills and return the lost items to their original owners. / Rodney only needs one more bird on his birdwatching list, but the only problem is that it only comes out at night! Team Zenko must help Rodney face his fear of the dark so he can get the last picture for his collection.

programme.title: The Yarn Fairy / Bake It ‘Til You Make It
programme.desc: When the trees start losing their leaves, Phoebe begins knitting the trees in the park sweaters, but when the neighborhood kids see the sweaters they think they're a mysterious "Yarn Fairy," and they want to see her in action, making it much harder for the Dews to put more sweaters on the latest trees that have lost their leaves.

programme.title: Dollhouse Fairy Tales
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Happy CAT-O-Ween
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Sea Monsters / Puff Fruit
programme.desc: Rumors of scary sea monsters in the East End take the kids on a journey of discovering you shouldn’t believe everything you hear. / Mysterious globs disturbing the ocean turn out to be the byproduct of food from Unicorn Land.

programme.title: Chef J's Tale
programme.desc: Chef J tells a tale about unicorns sailing in ships on clouds in search of Unicorn Land.

programme.title: Chaser and Chewer: Part Flea / Sing For Your Pupper
programme.desc: It’s another adventure with Tag and Scooch dressed up as their favorite comic book characters: Chaser and Chewer! But this time, bad guy Thunder (Frank) is asking for their help, because Flea (Beans) is trying to take over the town on his own. / When Tag and Scooch find out Wagnes has always dreamt of becoming a famous country music singer, they decide to make her dream come true.

programme.title: Dogcathalon
programme.desc: Mayor Sniffington mixed up the dates for the Dogcathalon and it turns out it’s being held today! Panicked, Tag and Scooch rush off to make sure the three race spots are race ready so they can be approved by the Top Dog. / The Dogcathalon Race has officially started! Tag goes into Crew Chief mode, running around to ensure Team Pawston is ready for each part of the race. But with Sam unable to race, he encourages Tag to take his place and win it all for Pawston.

programme.title: Wind
programme.desc: A fierce windstorm traps the gang inside the garage and they have fun together all night, but once the food runs out they team up to find a way out.

programme.title: Lucky and the Arabian Nightmares
programme.desc: When Al goes out of town, he puts the PALs in charge of the ramada, but they get more than they bargained for when three trouble-making horses escape

programme.title: Thunk O'clock High / The Croo-Gitive
programme.desc: Thunk must face a bully that's notorious for being an animal/The Croods flee after Grug is accused of robbing caves and stealing food for the Broods

programme.title: A Few Good Grugs / Valley Shine Day
programme.desc: The Valley has the first "try-all" against the Croods to see if Grug stole food for the Broods; Thunk asks Kevin to teach him to be more irresistible

programme.title: Total Nightmare
programme.desc: When Hookfang is drawn to a female Monstrous Nightmare, Snotlout tries to break them up before he loses his friend forever.

programme.title: Team Astrid
programme.desc: After Dagur attacks Berk, Astrid trauns a crew of back-up Dragon riders to battle back, although no one anticipates how soon the strike will come.

programme.title: One Last Job
programme.desc: The team plans a heist in order to obtain the enchanted pendant that can lead them to the storm wheels. Elsewhere, Klaus and Veruca shipwreck on a mysterious island that is actually home to the mages, and also the Tianshang weapon helmet.

programme.title: Doom and Groom
programme.desc: Po and the team have one last attempt to get the pendant, but they will have to disrupt Jayesh's wedding, and contend with his guards, to do so. At the mage island, Klaus and Veruca get hold of the Tianshang helmet.

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Cupcake Tree
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: The Fairy Festival!
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Wrinkles & Stickles
programme.desc: After Turtleneck is captured by Frederic Estes, Boss Baby and Tim attempt to rescue her, leading them to the terrifying "fun house" at the town fair

programme.title: Bossa Nova
programme.desc: After Boss Baby is fired from Baby Corp;he attempts to navigate regular baby life in a Mommy/Daddy/Baby playgroup. Even worse;the playgroup’s other new member is Mega Fat;whose animatronic stuffie Wagby malfunctions and threatens the safety of the whole group. Meanwhile;Tim does everything he can to avoid doing his homework.

programme.title: The Museum Job
programme.desc: When the crowded bathroom situation at the local museum threatens baby love;Boss Baby leads his new team of playgroup babies on their first mission…and then their SECOND mission after a klepto baby in their group swipes a priceless artifact. In a continued attempt to avoid homework;Tim joins Boss Baby on his mission.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Taxing Trauma of the Treacherous Tattle Trials Part I
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, the Melvins create a final exam that George and Harold will be sure to fail: the Doom Dome. To ensure success, Melvinborg injects Melvin's cells with nanobots, giving him heightened powers. But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! The boys enlist Captain Underpants to fight the jealous nerd, but their victory only loses the nanobots onto Piqua...

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Taxing Trauma of the Treacherous Tattle Trials Part II
programme.desc: Part two of the season finale finds George, Harold, Captain Underpants, and the Melvins trapped in the Doom Dome with rampaging nanobots. When the humans try to neautralize the bots, they find a new host: Captain Underpants. Now they must shrink down to go into Captain Underpants’ brain and defeat the nanobots’ leader, Nanozero. But they need help: Captain Underpants’ brain cells to the rescue! And when it’s all over, George and Harold will finally be able to go to summer camp.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Worrisome Wedge of the Water Warmongers
programme.desc: Harold and George can't wait to spend the summer together at camp. But not so fast, boys -- your old nemesis Mr. Krupp has a most unpleasant surprise.

programme.title: Chasing Phantoms
programme.desc: After an epic chase around the globe, the team finally catches Rafaela, making it Ms. Nowhere's 100th arrest - and the agency is throwing her a party! Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: The Convoy
programme.desc: When the team is framed for the events of Ms. Nowhere's party, they're arrested and are on their way to separate government facilities. It's up to Frostee, with a help from Sissy, to track down the team and bust them out before they're locked up for good!

programme.title: Born a Toretto
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Dire Straits
programme.desc: Viggo gets angry at the dragon riders continually interfering with his business and uses a deep sea dragon, the Submaripper, to control Berk's trade.

programme.title: The Longest Day
programme.desc: During the week of the Midnight Sun where the sun doesn't set for a week, Hiccup must deal with sleep deprivation and a dangerous new dragon.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Hiccup and the Riders, with help from Dagur hatch a plan to steal Berk's gold back.

programme.title: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: The Trollhunters are paused from action when their parents stage an intervention to get answers from the kids.

programme.title: The Oath
programme.desc: The Trollhunters race to stop Gunmar from acquiring a powerful relic, and Jim must do the unthinkable to stop him!

programme.title: For The Glory Of Merlin
programme.desc: Team Trollhunter discovers a surprising ally while trapped in a flooding tavern!

programme.title: An Uphill Battle
programme.desc: The Dragon Knights make a deal for the Storm Wheel but first must obtain the other Storm Wheel from a mysterious mad scientist. Though Mastodon continues to warn the team about the dangers in using the Tianshang Weapons, they use them in a fight against Klaus and Veruca. The clash of the weapons wakes a dormant volcano!

programme.title: The Mad Scientist
programme.desc: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programme.title: Today's Close-Up
programme.desc: Drug-resistant bacteria are infecting healthy people without being noticed, leading to what the WHO calls a "silent pandemic." We look at what we can do to protect ourselves.

programme.title: Seasoning the Seasons
programme.desc: This programme visits places across Japan to introduce the charms of their local daily life and festivals fostered by the nation's long history.
